root_cause: CSI controller is unavailable, causing controller-side volume operations to fail
evidence: Controller-side volume lifecycle failures repeat over time
Events show CSI controller RPC, timeout, or connection failures
Dominant CSI error: AttachVolume.Attach failed for volume "pvc-0f1a2b3c4d5e6f78" : rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = ControllerPublishVolume failed for driver ebs.csi.aws.com: connection refused

causes.message: CSI controller is unavailable or not responding
CSI control-plane cannot process controller-side volume operations
Pod cannot start because CSI-managed storage operations fail

pod:orders-db-0: Pod blocked because CSI controller-side operations are unavailable

likely_causes: CSI controller pods are down or crash-looping
CSI sidecars such as the provisioner, attacher, or resizer are not healthy
Network or DNS issues prevent controller-to-driver communication
Cloud provider API problems are causing CSI controller calls to fail
